title: torch-npu wheel requires PyYAML runtime dependency not declared in --no-deps install
problem_description: torch-npu 2.5.1 internally depends on the `yaml` (PyYAML) package at runtime for memory visualization and configuration parsing. When installing torch-npu with --no-deps (necessary to avoid version conflicts), PyYAML is not installed, causing a cascade failure during torch import that manifests as RuntimeError about backend extension loading.
rough_fix_approach: 1. After installing torch-npu with --no-deps, always install pyyaml as a companion. 2. Verify with `python -c 'import torch; import torch_npu'` and check for yaml ModuleNotFoundError. 3. Add pyyaml to project's pinned requirements if torch-npu is present.
